title: crotalaria angulata
intro: Crotalaria angulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and infections. The health benefits of Crotalaria angulata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, swelling, and the risk of infection. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
